prerequisites.value: You must permanently dwell in a settlement at least as large as a large town. You must also have a fey ancestor somewhere in your family line, or have The Wanderer background.

description.value:
**Benefit:** When interacting with NPCs who live in your settlement, you gain a +1 bonus on Bluff, Diplomacy, and Sense Motive checks. Goal: Complete the tasks to satisfy the terms of the law, matter of honor, or other responsibility, freeing you to leave the settlement without shame.

**Special:** Your newfound freedom inspires your body and mind. You gain a +1 bonus on Dexterity – and Intelligence -based ability checks and skill checks and on Will saving throws.
